_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) processes
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.519), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.548). Shared vocabulary: [security]. NICE-only terms [assessment, authorization, knowledge, processes, sa] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.859, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 8-word NICE element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) processes" and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.535 ≈ STS 0.548 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [security]. NICE-only: [assessment, authorization, knowledge, processes, sa]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
